prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, bustling atmosphere. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, stands at a polished wooden table holding a leather-bound ledger. She points to a detailed quest map spread across the table. Ari Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, leans in beside her, both characters focused on the map. Cinematic lighting, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot. Ari Emberlane nods in agreement, reaching out to help Mira Ledgerfall align the map edges. Together, they place a heavy brass guild seal onto a commission document on the table. Mira offers a brief, confident nod of approval as Ari adjusts her messenger straps, both characters maintaining consistent appearances and fluid, professional body cooperation. No text, no watermark.
